currentlyBuilding.headline: AI Resume Intelligence Platform
currentlyBuilding.body: Automating ATS-optimized resume generation using multi-LLM orchestration and LaTeX pipelines.

introduction.description: I build cloud systems that don't break at 3am. From zero-downtime migrations to cost-optimized infrastructure. I obsess over reliability, automation, and giving teams the confidence to deploy. Currently architecting scalable infrastructure at Buyogo AG.
introduction.chatPrompt: Questions about DevOps, reliability, or cloud infrastructure? Ask the chat.
